content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 7, 0), (8, 9, 0), (5, 6, 4), (1, 5, 6), (0, 6, 7), (2, 8, 8), (1, 6, 10), (1, 9, 10), (6, 7, 10), (7, 8, 10), (0, 1, 11), (3, 6, 11), (0, 5, 12), (3, 4, 13), (5, 9, 13), (2, 5, 16)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 11.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 11:

* Edge (0, 6, 7) has node 0 and time 7. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 6, 11) has node 0 and time 11. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 1, 11) has node 0 and time 11. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (2, 5, 16) has node 0 but time is 16 (not 11). -> Ignore.
* Edge (5, 9, 13) has node 0 but time is 13 (not 11). -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 4, 13) has node 0 but time is 13 (not 11). -> Ignore.

The nodes matched are 6 and 1.

Answer: [6, 1]
